params.name: Skidbladnir Ship
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Nov 28, 56,201 BC, Freyr received a new gift, a brand new ship.

It was a totally unexpected gift. Loki stole Sif's hair and she started hunting him down. Loki asked Dvalinn to make golden hair to appease Sif, and Dvalinn also made the Skidbladnir and presented the boat to Freyr so that he could settle the matter. The boat is stretchable. It can hold all gods of Asgard and their gear at its maximum size but also can become as small as the size of a handkerchief. It always finds good wind when …
